title: Clinogyne ramosissima
taxonomy: Clinogyne ramosissima is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to tropical Africa and Madagascar. Clinogyne ramosissima is classified as a shrub or small tree, known for its numerous branches and leaves. The exact classification of Clinogyne ramosissima is as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Class - Magnoliopsida, Order - Celastrales, Family - Celastraceae, Genus - Clinogyne, Species - C. ramosissima. More research is needed to determine the full classification of this species.
uses: Clinogyne ramosissima is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa.
